text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
131 
CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Service Classification Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: The type of service provided to the beneficiary. 
SHORT NAME: TYPESRVC 
LONG NAME: CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
For facility type code 1 thru 6, and 9: 
1 = Inpatient 
2 = Inpatient or home health (covered 
on Part B) 
3 = Outpatient (or HHA
